channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Naomi Girma, San Jose’s Olympic gold medalist, breaks world record with Chelsea move
item.description: Girma attended Pioneer High School in San Jose and Stanford University before becoming a pro soccer star
item.dc:creator: Joseph Dycus, The Mercury News

item.title: AP's all-College Football Playoff team features an all-Ohio State offensive backfield
item.description: Ohio State’s run to its first national championship in a decade enabled the Buckeyes to dominate the Associated Press’ all-College Football Playoff team.
item.dc:creator: Steve Megargee, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Young collector nabs rare Paul Skenes card that could offer him a hefty haul in trade with Pirates
item.description: An 11-year-old collector in Los Angeles has scooped up a one-of-a-kind baseball card featuring National League Rookie of the Year Paul Skenes. Topps announced Tuesday that the card, which features the Pittsburgh Pirates pitcher’s autograph and a patch from a game-worn jersey, had been found.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: 4 indicted in break-ins at luxury homes, but link to athlete burglaries unclear
item.description: Four men from Chile were indicted Tuesday in what the Ohio attorney general called a string of burglaries at multimillion-dollar homes, but he declined to say whether professional athletes were the targets.
item.dc:creator: JOHN SEEWER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: 11-year-old pulls ultra rare Paul Skenes rookie card, Pirates says massive trade deal stands
item.description: The card, which contains the "Debut Patch" worn by Paul Skenes, quickly became a highly-coveted item. After months of search, an 11-year-old has reportedly come up with it.
item.dc:creator: Will Conybeare, WGN 9

item.title: Four players with San Diego ties to play at 2025 Farmers Insurance Open
item.description: The 2025 Farmers Insurance Open kicks off Wednesday morning at Torrey Pines Golf Course in La Jolla with a purse of $9.3 million up for grabs over the four-day event.
item.dc:creator: Rhea Caoile, Fox 5

item.title: Brittney Griner to test the market for the first time in career as WNBA free agency opens
item.description: MIAMI (AP) — Brittney Griner is testing the free agent market for the first time in her career. The All-Star center is taking meetings starting Tuesday with multiple teams, according to her agent. WNBA executives were in Miami for the opening of Unrivaled to talk with Griner and other free agents.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Chilean nationals arrested, linked to Joe Burrow home burglary
item.description: An SUV search reportedly found "an old LSU shirt and Bengals hat believed to have been stolen" from the incident.
item.dc:creator: Patrick Djordjevic, NewsNation

item.title: Ichiro Suzuki, CC Sabathia and Billy Wagner elected to Baseball Hall of Fame
item.description: Ichiro Suzuki became the first Japanese player chosen for baseball’s Hall of Fame, falling one vote shy of unanimous when he was elected along with CC Sabathia and Billy Wagner.
item.dc:creator: Ronald Blum, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Coco Gauff says she has more work to do after losing at the Australian Open. Djokovic beats Alcaraz
item.description: MELBOURNE, Australia (AP) — Coco Gauff's retooled forehand and serve abandoned her in the worst way and at the worst time at the Australian Open.
item.dc:creator: HOWARD FENDRICH, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Report: Bears hiring Lions OC Ben Johnson as next head coach
item.description: The Chicago Bears are reportedly finalizing a deal to hire Detroit Lions offensive coordinator Ben Johnson as their new head coach.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Coco Gauff writes 'RIP TikTok USA' on a TV camera at the Australian Open
item.description: MELBOURNE, Australia (AP) — American tennis star Coco Gauff mourned the loss of TikTok's app back home, writing on a TV camera lens “RIP TikTok USA” and drawing a broken heart right after winning a match at the Australian Open to reach the quarterfinals.
item.dc:creator: HOWARD FENDRICH, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Travis Kelce makes NFL history in first game of three-peat quest
item.description: Once again, Travis Kelce has broken a record at Arrowhead Stadium after catching a pass from Patrick Mahomes.
item.dc:creator: Dillon Seckington, Fox 5

item.title: Blackhawks take losing streak into game against the Golden Knights
item.description: Vegas Golden Knights (29-13-3, in the Pacific Division) vs. Chicago Blackhawks (14-28-3, in the Central Division) Chicago; Saturday, 8 p.m.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Breanna Stewart scores first basket in Unrivaled history in debut of 3-on-3 women's league
item.description: MIAMI (AP) — Unrivaled shined brightly on its opening night. The 3-on-3 women’s basketball league co-founded by WNBA stars Breanna Stewart and Napheesa Collier debuted Friday night.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Utah Valley wins on overtime buzzer-beater, 85-83
item.description: ARLINGTON, Tex. (ABC4 Sports) - Texas native Kylin Green went the full length of the floor in five seconds and dished to Jackson Holcombe, who scored in the final second of overtime to lift Utah Valley to a thrilling 85-83 road victory over UT Arlington on Thursday night at College Park Center.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Montrose boys basketball escapes a scare from Central as Red Hawk girls dominate Warriors
item.description: For the first time this season the high-flying Red Hawks of Montrose made the trip to the Grand Valley.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5

item.title: How to watch Stanford vs. UNC basketball in the Bay Area
item.description: (KRON) -- The Stanford Cardinal men's basketball team will face North Carolina in a cross-country ACC battle on Saturday. The game is being shown exclusively on KRON4. Stanford (11-6, 3-3 ACC) and UNC (12-6, 5-1 ACC) tip off at 11:15 a.m. PT. You can watch on KRON4 on stream on the CW app.
item.dc:creator: Phil Mayer, KRON4

item.title: Plateau Valley’s Jack Vig Joins Elite Club with 1,000-Point Milestone
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX)— Plateau Valley High School senior Jack Vig recently reached a milestone few high school basketball players achieve — a 1,000-point career “It just felt like another two points for my career. It wasn’t a big deal for me.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5

item.title: Aggies six-game winning streak ends at UNLV, 65-62
item.description: LAS VEGAS (ABC4 Sports) - Utah State basketball team suffered just its second loss of the season Wednesday night, falling at UNLV, 65-62. Tucker Anderson led the Aggies with 19 points, but the Aggies missed its last six shots of the game, and dropped to 16-2 on the season. Dedan Thomas Jr.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Utes earn first Big 12 road win, beating TCU 73-65
item.description: FORT WORTH, Tex. (AP) - After getting its first Big 12 Conference win on Saturday, the Runnin' Utes now have their first Big 12 winning streak. Gabe Madsen scored 17 points, Keanu Dawes added 16 and Utah never trailed in a 73-65 victory over TCU on Wednesday night.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: SuperMotocross World Championship comes to San Diego: What to know
item.description: Snapdragon Stadium will host the Monster Energy AMA Supercross Championship on Saturday, continuing the legacy of off-road motorsports in San Diego.
item.dc:creator: Rhea Caoile, Fox 5
